src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Configure OAuth2 login to use a custom GrantedAuthoritiesMapper to dynamically assign roles based on user attributes.
Implement logic to map OAuth2 user attributes to Spring Security roles, specifically checking for admin status and UCSB membership.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: private GrantedAuthoritiesMapper userAuthoritiesMapper() { ... if (isAdmin(email)) { mappedAuthorities.add(new SimpleGrantedAuthority("ROLE_ADMIN")); } ... }

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add a helper method to determine if a user is an admin by checking a configuration list or the database.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: public boolean isAdmin(String email) { if (adminEmails.contains(email)) { return true; } Optional<User> u = userRepository.findByEmail(email); return u.isPresent() && u.get().isAdmin(); }

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject the list of admin emails from application properties to support the admin role assignment logic.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: @Value("${app.admin.emails}") private final List<String> adminEmails = new ArrayList<String>();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject UserRepository to allow checking user admin status from the database during OAuth2 login.
Add import for the new CurrentUser model class to support the updated API.
Rename the currentUser method to getUser to align with service layer naming conventions.
Add a new getCurrentUser method to expose the richer CurrentUser object from the service.
Added Swagger annotations to document the API endpoint for the current user information.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: @Api(description="Current User Information") @ApiOperation(value = "Get information about current user")

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add googleSub field to store Google OAuth subject identifier.
Add pictureUrl field to store user profile image URL.
Add fullName field to store user's full name.
Add givenName field to store user's first name.
Add familyName field to store user's last name.
Add emailVerified field to track email verification status.
Add locale field to store user's locale preference.
Add hostedDomain field to store Google Workspace domain.
Add admin field to explicitly track admin status.
Remove isMember method that derived membership from email domain.
Rename abstract method get() to getUser() for clarity and consistency.
Add abstract method to retrieve the full CurrentUser object.
Add abstract method to retrieve user roles as a collection of GrantedAuthority.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: public abstract Collection<? extends GrantedAuthority> getRoles();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Update isLoggedIn() to call the renamed getUser() method.
Remove isMember() method as membership logic is likely consolidated or removed.
Update imports to reflect new model usage and remove unused Lombok delegate.
Replace Lombok's java.util.logging annotation with SLF4J to standardize logging across the application.
Inject a list of admin emails from application properties to determine user admin status.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: @Value("${app.admin.emails}") final private List<String> adminEmails = new ArrayList<String>();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Split user retrieval logic into separate methods for User entity and CurrentUser DTO to support richer profile data.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: public CurrentUser getCurrentUser() { ... } public User getUser() { ... }

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Extract additional profile attributes from OAuth2User to populate the User entity with more detailed information.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: String googleSub = oAuthUser.getAttribute("sub"); String pictureUrl = oAuthUser.getAttribute("picture"); ...

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Update the User builder to include new fields extracted from OAuth attributes.
Automatically set the admin flag on users if their email is in the configured admin list.
Add a method to retrieve the current user's security roles/authorities.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: public Collection<? extends GrantedAuthority> getRoles() { ... return authentication.getAuthorities(); }

src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject a mocked UserRepository to satisfy controller dependencies in the unit test.
Replace custom login helper method with Spring Security's @WithMockUser annotation for cleaner test setup.
Remove a test case that likely became redundant or was replaced by the simplified mock user setup.
Update imports to include new Spring Security test support and remove unused entity imports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Increment project version to 1.1.0 to reflect the new release cycle.
Remove flyway-core dependency as it is no longer needed or managed differently.
Update spring-dotenv to 2.4.1 for latest features and bug fixes.
Add jacoco-maven-plugin to generate code coverage reports during the build process.
Update frontend-maven-plugin to 1.12.1 to ensure compatibility with modern Node.js versions used in Java 17 environments.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Added a new environment variable for configuring admin emails.
Updated placeholder values for Google OAuth credentials to point to documentation.

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary files and reports from version control.
Exclude the built Storybook static directory from version control.
Ignore root-level package-lock.json while explicitly allowing the frontend-specific one.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the Docker container to support Storybook development environment.
